_meta.description: Curated code examples for the React SDK reference pages. Keyed by export name or page section.

CrossmintWalletProvider.note: CrossmintWalletProvider must be nested inside CrossmintProvider.

ExportPrivateKeyButton.note: Only works with email and phone signers. Will not render for passkey or external wallet signers.

CrossmintCheckoutProvider.note: CrossmintCheckoutProvider must be nested inside CrossmintProvider.

CrossmintPaymentMethodManagement.note: CrossmintPaymentMethodManagement renders an iframe-based UI for managing saved payment methods. Requires a valid JWT for authentication. The onPaymentMethodSelected callback receives a discriminated union — narrow on `type` before accessing variant-specific fields.
